<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,500;9..144,600;9..144,700;9..144,800&family=Archivo:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Caveat:wght@600;700&display=swap');

:root{
  --broth:#16271C;        /* deep simmering green-black, like reduced broth */
  --broth-2:#1E3527;
  --paper:#FBF4E7;        /* warm steamed-bun cream */
  --paper-2:#F3E9D6;
  --ink:#1C2A20;
  --ink-soft:#52614F;
  --chili:#C2401F;        /* hot chili-flame red */
  --chili-deep:#9A2E16;
  --turmeric:#D69A2D;     /* gold for Indian / Nasi Kandar side */
  --leaf:#3F7A4E;         /* fresh herb green accent */
  --line:rgba(28,42,32,0.14);
  --line-dark:rgba(251,244,231,0.16);
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
body{font-family:'Archivo',sans-serif;color:var(--ink);}
.page{width:1280px;height:720px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:var(--paper);}
.page.dark{background:var(--broth);color:var(--paper);}
h1,h2,h3{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-0.01em;}
.script{font-family:'Caveat',cursive;}

.kicker{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--chili);}
.kicker.dark{color:#E8B36B;}
.htitle{font-size:35px;margin-top:10px;line-height:1.14;color:var(--ink);max-width:900px;}
.htitle.dark{color:var(--paper);}
.htitle.sm{font-size:28px;}
.dek{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.58;max-width:680px;margin-top:13px;}
.dek.dark{color:#C9D6CB;}

.content{padding:50px 64px 0 64px;height:100%;position:relative;}

.tag{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.5px;border-radius:20px;padding:6px 14px;display:inline-block;}
.tag.chili{background:rgba(194,64,31,0.1);color:var(--chili-deep);}
.tag.leaf{background:rgba(63,122,78,0.12);color:#2E5A3A;}
.tag.gold{background:rgba(214,154,45,0.14);color:#8A6517;}
.tag.line-dark{border:1px solid rgba(251,244,231,0.45);color:var(--paper);}

.frame{position:relative;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;overflow:hidden;}
.frame-label{font-size:10.5px;letter-spacing:0.4px;color:#8A7B5E;text-align:center;max-width:78%;line-height:1.5;font-weight:600;}

.pagenum{position:absolute;bottom:30px;left:64px;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-weight:700;}
.pagenum.dark{color:#9FB39B;}
.footer-right{position:absolute;bottom:30px;right:64px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.75;}
.footer-right.dark{color:#9FB39B;}

.chipnum{
  width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:'Fraunces';font-weight:700;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="page dark" data-document-role="page" data-label="Cover">
  <div style="position:absolute; top:-30px; right:-10px; opacity:0.5;">
    <svg width="105" height="198" viewBox="0 0 105 198" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(10,22) scale(1.5)" opacity="1">
      <path d="M0,90 C-10,72 8,68 2,50 C-6,34 10,28 4,10 C-2,-4 8,-10 6,-22"
        stroke="#3F7A4E" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M22,90 C12,74 28,66 22,48 C16,32 30,24 24,6"
        stroke="#3F7A4E" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/>
    </g></svg>
    <svg width="85" height="153" viewBox="0 0 85 153" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(10,22) scale(1.1)" opacity="0.6">
      <path d="M0,90 C-10,72 8,68 2,50 C-6,34 10,28 4,10 C-2,-4 8,-10 6,-22"
        stroke="#E8B36B" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M22,90 C12,74 28,66 22,48 C16,32 30,24 24,6"
        stroke="#E8B36B" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/>
    </g></svg>
  </div>
  <div style="position:absolute; top:64px; right:90px;">
    <svg width="237" height="160" viewBox="0 0 237 160" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(1.35)" fill="none" stroke="#3F7A4E" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg>
  </div>
  <div style="padding:56px 64px 0 64px;">
    <div class="kicker dark">
      <svg width="49" height="49" viewBox="0 0 49 49" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(14,10) scale(0.34)" fill="none" stroke="#E8B36B" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M0,0 C8,-6 18,-6 24,-10 M0,0 C-2,-8 4,-14 12,-14" stroke-width="2.55"/>
      <path d="M0,0 C34,-2 54,22 44,46 C36,64 16,68 6,54 C-6,38 -10,14 0,0 Z"/>
    </g></svg>
      <span>WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &nbsp;/&nbsp; COMPANY PROFILE &nbsp;/&nbsp; 2026</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="position:absolute; top:235px; left:64px; right:64px;">
    <h1 style="font-size:60px; color:var(--paper); line-height:1.05;">Ya Barr Solutions<br/>Sdn&nbsp;Bhd</h1>
    <div class="script" style="font-size:24px; color:#E8B36B; margin-top:14px;">Halal multicuisine, made with real craft.</div>
  </div>
  <div style="position:absolute; top:432px; left:64px;"><svg width="1152" height="14" style="display:block;"><path d="M0,6 C25,-2 35,14 60,6 C85,-2 95,14 120,6 C140,0 150,10 160,4" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M160,6 C185,-2 195,14 220,6 C245,-2 255,14 280,6 C300,0 310,10 320,4" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M320,6 C345,-2 355,14 380,6 C405,-2 415,14 440,6 C460,0 470,10 480,4" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M480,6 C505,-2 515,14 540,6 C565,-2 575,14 600,6 C620,0 630,10 640,4" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M640,6 C665,-2 675,14 700,6 C725,-2 735,14 760,6 C780,0 790,10 800,4" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M800,6 C825,-2 835,14 860,6 C885,-2 895,14 920,6 C940,0 950,10 960,4" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M960,6 C985,-2 995,14 1020,6 C1045,-2 1055,14 1080,6 C1100,0 1110,10 1120,4" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.22"/></svg></div>
  <div style="position:absolute; top:466px; left:64px; display:flex; gap:0;">
    <div style="width:280px; padding-right:30px; border-right:1px solid var(--line-dark);">
      <div style="background:var(--paper);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 18px;display:inline-block;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="max-width:160px;max-height:56px;object-fit:contain;display:block;" /></div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#E8B36B;font-weight:700;margin-top:14px;">BRAND 01 &mdash; NASI KANDAR &amp; REGIONAL INDIAN</div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:300px; padding-left:30px;">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="max-width:210px;max-height:64px;object-fit:contain;" />
      <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#E8B36B;font-weight:700;margin-top:14px;">BRAND 02 &mdash; CHINESE MUSLIM &amp; HALAL STEAMBOAT</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum dark">KOTA DAMANSARA &amp; TTDI, SELANGOR / KUALA LUMPUR</div>
  <div class="footer-right dark">PREPARED FOR KPDN REVIEW</div>
</div>

<div class="page" data-document-role="page" data-label="What We Do">
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker"><svg width="47" height="46" viewBox="0 0 47 46" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(14,10) scale(0.3)" fill="none" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M0,0 C8,-6 18,-6 24,-10 M0,0 C-2,-8 4,-14 12,-14" stroke-width="2.55"/>
      <path d="M0,0 C34,-2 54,22 44,46 C36,64 16,68 6,54 C-6,38 -10,14 0,0 Z"/>
    </g></svg><span>SECTION 01 &middot; ABOUT US</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle">A Specialist Halal Dining Group, Not a General Eatery</h2>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:48px; margin-top:26px;">
      <div style="width:560px;">
        <p class="dek">Ya Barr Solutions Sdn Bhd is a Malaysian halal food &amp; beverage company built on a family
        culinary legacy dating to 2010. We operate two purpose-built restaurant brands, each created around a
        cuisine specialisation that is genuinely underserved in Malaysia's halal dining market.</p>
        <p class="dek" style="margin-top:14px;">Unlike a general mamak stall or hawker operation, our concepts demand
        trained, experienced chefs and a controlled, air-conditioned dining environment &mdash; authentic halal
        Chinese Muslim cuisine and halal steamboat on one side, focused North/South Indian and Nasi Kandar cooking
        on the other.</p>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:18px; margin-top:32px;">
          <div class="tag leaf">EST. 2010</div>
          <div class="tag chili">2 SPECIALIST BRANDS</div>
          <div class="tag gold">100% MUSLIM-OWNED</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="position:relative;">
        <div class="frame" style="width:440px;height:380px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="440" height="380" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M430,352 C430,364 424,370 412,370 L388,370" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"><svg width="163" height="115" viewBox="0 0 163 115" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(0.9)" fill="none" stroke="#9A8B66" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div class="frame-label">FOUNDER HERITAGE / FLAGSHIP DINING ROOM &mdash; PHOTO TO BE INSERTED</div>
    </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 02/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

<div class="page" data-document-role="page" data-label="Our Brands">
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker"><svg width="32" height="36" viewBox="0 0 32 36" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(6,4) scale(0.22)" fill="none" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="3.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M4,60 C4,80 20,92 40,92 C60,92 76,80 76,60" />
      <path d="M40,4 C30,22 18,30 22,46 C25,58 35,60 38,52 C40,58 32,66 40,76 C50,84 64,74 60,58 C70,64 68,46 56,36 C58,28 50,18 40,4 Z" opacity="0.9"/>
    </g></svg><span>SECTION 02 &middot; OUR BRANDS</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle">Two Brands, Two Distinct Specialisations</h2>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:28px; margin-top:24px;">
      <div style="width:556px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:20px 20px 20px 4px;padding:28px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:24px;right:26px;opacity:0.16;"><svg width="82" height="91" viewBox="0 0 82 91" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(14,10) scale(0.85)" fill="none" stroke="#9A2E16" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M0,0 C8,-6 18,-6 24,-10 M0,0 C-2,-8 4,-14 12,-14" stroke-width="2.04"/>
      <path d="M0,0 C34,-2 54,22 44,46 C36,64 16,68 6,54 C-6,38 -10,14 0,0 Z"/>
    </g></svg></div>
        <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 16px;display:inline-block;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="max-width:160px;max-height:56px;object-fit:contain;display:block;" /></div>
        <div class="tag chili" style="margin-top:16px;">NASI KANDAR &amp; REGIONAL INDIAN</div>
        <p class="dek" style="margin-top:14px;font-size:13px;">A homage to our founder's original restaurant. A1 Bistro serves
        authentic Nasi Kandar and hearty &agrave;-la-carte North &amp; South Indian fare &mdash; prepared by
        specialist Indian chefs in a comfortable, air-conditioned 80+ seat dining room in Kota Damansara.</p>
        <div style="margin-top:18px;"><div class="frame" style="width:500px;height:150px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="500" height="150" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M490,122 C490,134 484,140 472,140 L448,140" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"></div>
      <div class="frame-label">A1 BISTRO &mdash; PREMISE / DISH PHOTO</div>
    </div></div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:556px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:20px 20px 4px 20px;padding:28px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:20px;right:24px;opacity:0.22;"><svg width="105" height="80" viewBox="0 0 105 80" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(0.55)" fill="none" stroke="#3F7A4E" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg></div>
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="max-width:190px;max-height:60px;object-fit:contain;" />
        <div class="tag leaf" style="margin-top:16px;">CHINESE MUSLIM &amp; HALAL STEAMBOAT</div>
        <p class="dek" style="margin-top:14px;font-size:13px;">A pioneering halal concept led by a chef with 10+ years' industry
        experience. Kiya's brings authentic Chinese Muslim cuisine and communal halal steamboat &mdash; a format
        rarely available halal in Malaysia &mdash; to diners in TTDI and via delivery.</p>
        <div style="margin-top:18px;"><div class="frame" style="width:500px;height:150px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="500" height="150" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M490,122 C490,134 484,140 472,140 L448,140" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"></div>
      <div class="frame-label">KIYA'S &mdash; PREMISE / DISH PHOTO</div>
    </div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 03/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

<div class="page dark" data-document-role="page" data-label="Why We Do Not Compete with Local Hawkers">
  <div style="position:absolute;bottom:-40px;right:-20px;opacity:0.15;"><svg width="378" height="245" viewBox="0 0 378 245" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(2.2)" fill="none" stroke="#E8B36B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg></div>
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker dark"><svg width="47" height="46" viewBox="0 0 47 46" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(14,10) scale(0.3)" fill="none" stroke="#E8B36B" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M0,0 C8,-6 18,-6 24,-10 M0,0 C-2,-8 4,-14 12,-14" stroke-width="2.55"/>
      <path d="M0,0 C34,-2 54,22 44,46 C36,64 16,68 6,54 C-6,38 -10,14 0,0 Z"/>
    </g></svg><span>SECTION 03 &middot; MARKET POSITIONING</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle dark sm" style="max-width:1080px;">A Specialised Concept That Complements, Not Competes With, Local Trade</h2>
    <div class="dek dark" style="max-width:1000px;">Our brands fill a genuine gap in Malaysia's halal dining market through
    specialist cuisine, trained culinary expertise and a premium dining format that small local hawker stalls do not offer.</div>
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:20px; margin-top:26px; width:1100px;">
      
    <div style="width:540px; background:rgba(251,244,231,0.05); border:1px solid var(--line-dark); border-radius:16px; padding:24px; display:flex; gap:18px; align-items:flex-start;">
      <div class="chipnum" style="background:#C2401F;color:#fff;"><svg width="71" height="59" viewBox="0 0 71 59" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(0.34)" fill="none" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-weight:700; font-size:16.5px; color:var(--paper);">Genuinely Underserved Niche</div>
        <div style="font-size:11.5px; color:#C9D6CB; margin-top:8px; line-height:1.55;">Halal Chinese Muslim cuisine and halal steamboat are rarely found in Malaysia. Most Chinese-style steamboat and wok cooking is non-halal, leaving Muslim diners with very limited authentic options &mdash; a real market gap, not a duplication of existing hawker offerings.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:540px; background:rgba(251,244,231,0.05); border:1px solid var(--line-dark); border-radius:16px; padding:24px; display:flex; gap:18px; align-items:flex-start;">
      <div class="chipnum" style="background:#3F7A4E;color:#fff;"><svg width="42" height="47" viewBox="0 0 42 47" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(6,4) scale(0.34)" fill="none" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M4,60 C4,80 20,92 40,92 C60,92 76,80 76,60" />
      <path d="M40,4 C30,22 18,30 22,46 C25,58 35,60 38,52 C40,58 32,66 40,76 C50,84 64,74 60,58 C70,64 68,46 56,36 C58,28 50,18 40,4 Z" opacity="0.9"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-weight:700; font-size:16.5px; color:var(--paper);">Specialist Skill, Not General Cooking</div>
        <div style="font-size:11.5px; color:#C9D6CB; margin-top:8px; line-height:1.55;">Our menus require culinary training and technique not found in typical hawker or mamak operations &mdash; halal wok-hei Chinese cooking, broth-based steamboat preparation, and authentic Nasi Kandar curry-making.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:540px; background:rgba(251,244,231,0.05); border:1px solid var(--line-dark); border-radius:16px; padding:24px; display:flex; gap:18px; align-items:flex-start;">
      <div class="chipnum" style="background:#C2401F;color:#fff;"><svg width="63" height="67" viewBox="0 0 63 67" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(14,10) scale(0.55)" fill="none" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M0,0 C8,-6 18,-6 24,-10 M0,0 C-2,-8 4,-14 12,-14" stroke-width="2.55"/>
      <path d="M0,0 C34,-2 54,22 44,46 C36,64 16,68 6,54 C-6,38 -10,14 0,0 Z"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-weight:700; font-size:16.5px; color:var(--paper);">Controlled, Premium Dining Environment</div>
        <div style="font-size:11.5px; color:#C9D6CB; margin-top:8px; line-height:1.55;">Both outlets operate as full, air-conditioned, sit-down restaurants with proper seating, service staff and consistent food-safety standards &mdash; distinct from open-air hawker stalls or roadside vendors.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:540px; background:rgba(251,244,231,0.05); border:1px solid var(--line-dark); border-radius:16px; padding:24px; display:flex; gap:18px; align-items:flex-start;">
      <div class="chipnum" style="background:#3F7A4E;color:#fff;"><svg width="46" height="46" viewBox="0 0 46 46" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(6,4) scale(0.42)" fill="none" stroke="#FBF4E7" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M2,70 C2,30 30,2 70,2 C66,30 60,46 40,56 C56,52 64,40 70,24 C72,50 56,70 24,72 C40,66 48,56 50,46 C36,60 18,68 2,70 Z"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-weight:700; font-size:16.5px; color:var(--paper);">Structured, Multicuisine Menu</div>
        <div style="font-size:11.5px; color:#C9D6CB; margin-top:8px; line-height:1.55;">We offer a deliberately curated menu spanning Chinese Muslim, Indian, Western and vegetarian-friendly dishes under one roof &mdash; a format and scale not offered by small independent hawker stalls.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum dark">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 04/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right dark">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

<div class="page" data-document-role="page" data-label="Culinary Leadership">
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker"><svg width="51" height="47" viewBox="0 0 51 47" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(0.22)" fill="none" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="3.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg><span>SECTION 04 &middot; CULINARY LEADERSHIP</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle">Specialist Chefs, Authentic Expertise</h2>
    <div class="dek">Authenticity is non-negotiable. Our kitchens are led by experienced culinary specialists
    whose expertise underpins the distinctiveness of our menus.</div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:28px; margin-top:24px;">
      <div style="width:556px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:20px 20px 20px 4px;padding:28px;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
          <svg width="71" height="59" viewBox="0 0 71 59" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(0.34)" fill="none" stroke="#3F7A4E" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg>
          <div>
            <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-size:19px; font-weight:700;">Head Chef &mdash; Kiya's</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-soft);">Chinese Muslim &amp; Steamboat</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tag leaf" style="margin-top:16px;">10+ YRS INDUSTRY &middot; 5 YRS WITH KIYA'S</div>
        <p class="dek" style="margin-top:14px; font-size:12.5px;">Specialises in Chinese Muslim cuisine and halal
        steamboat preparation, ensuring every dish stays true to its origins. Full chef CV and an internal
        experience letter covering tenure with the company to be attached as supporting documentation.</p>
        <div style="margin-top:16px;"><div class="frame" style="width:500px;height:215px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="500" height="215" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M490,187 C490,199 484,205 472,205 L448,205" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"></div>
      <div class="frame-label">CHEF PHOTO / SIGNATURE DISH</div>
    </div></div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:556px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:20px 20px 4px 20px;padding:28px;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
          <svg width="54" height="56" viewBox="0 0 54 56" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(14,10) scale(0.42)" fill="none" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M0,0 C8,-6 18,-6 24,-10 M0,0 C-2,-8 4,-14 12,-14" stroke-width="2.55"/>
      <path d="M0,0 C34,-2 54,22 44,46 C36,64 16,68 6,54 C-6,38 -10,14 0,0 Z"/>
    </g></svg>
          <div>
            <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-size:19px; font-weight:700;">Specialist Indian Chefs</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-soft);">A1 Bistro</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tag chili" style="margin-top:16px;">NASI KANDAR &amp; REGIONAL INDIAN SPECIALISTS</div>
        <p class="dek" style="margin-top:14px; font-size:12.5px;">Dedicated to authentic Nasi Kandar and North &amp;
        South Indian cooking, the heart of our founder's legacy. Chef credentials to be attached as supporting
        documentation.</p>
        <div style="margin-top:16px;"><div class="frame" style="width:500px;height:215px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="500" height="215" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M490,187 C490,199 484,205 472,205 L448,205" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"></div>
      <div class="frame-label">CHEF PHOTO / SIGNATURE DISH</div>
    </div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 05/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

<div class="page" data-document-role="page" data-label="Our Premises">
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker"><svg width="32" height="33" viewBox="0 0 32 33" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(6,4) scale(0.24)" fill="none" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="3.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M2,70 C2,30 30,2 70,2 C66,30 60,46 40,56 C56,52 64,40 70,24 C72,50 56,70 24,72 C40,66 48,56 50,46 C36,60 18,68 2,70 Z"/>
    </g></svg><span>SECTION 05 &middot; OUR PREMISES</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle">Air-Conditioned, Quality Dining Spaces</h2>
    <div class="dek">Both outlets operate as proper, sit-down, air-conditioned restaurants with dedicated seating,
    service staff and consistent presentation standards.</div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:28px; margin-top:24px;">
      <div style="width:556px;">
        <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-size:18px; font-weight:700;">A1 Bistro &mdash; Kota Damansara</div>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; margin-top:14px;">
          <div class="frame" style="width:272px;height:235px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="272" height="235" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M262,207 C262,219 256,225 244,225 L220,225" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"></div>
      <div class="frame-label">INTERIOR</div>
    </div>
          <div class="frame" style="width:272px;height:235px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="272" height="235" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M262,207 C262,219 256,225 244,225 L220,225" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"></div>
      <div class="frame-label">SEATING / SIGNAGE</div>
    </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:14px;">
          <div class="tag chili">80+ SEATS</div><div class="tag gold">AIR-CONDITIONED</div><div class="tag leaf">FULL-SERVICE</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:556px;">
        <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-size:18px; font-weight:700;">Kiya's &mdash; TTDI</div>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; margin-top:14px;">
          <div class="frame" style="width:272px;height:235px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="272" height="235" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M262,207 C262,219 256,225 244,225 L220,225" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"></div>
      <div class="frame-label">INTERIOR / BALCONY</div>
    </div>
          <div class="frame" style="width:272px;height:235px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="272" height="235" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M262,207 C262,219 256,225 244,225 L220,225" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"></div>
      <div class="frame-label">SEATING / SIGNAGE</div>
    </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:14px;">
          <div class="tag leaf">BALCONY DINING</div><div class="tag gold">CAF&Eacute;-STYLE INDOOR</div><div class="tag chili">FIRST-FLOOR</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 06/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

<div class="page" data-document-role="page" data-label="Sample Menu Highlights">
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker"><svg width="47" height="67" viewBox="0 0 47 67" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(10,5) scale(0.55) rotate(18)" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round">
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="6" y2="86"/>
      <line x1="14" y1="0" x2="20" y2="86"/>
    </g></svg><span>SECTION 06 &middot; MENU SPECIMEN</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle">Signature Dishes That Define Our Specialisation</h2>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:18px; margin-top:26px;">
      <div class="frame" style="width:263px;height:300px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="263" height="300" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M253,272 C253,284 247,290 235,290 L211,290" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"><svg width="66" height="71" viewBox="0 0 66 71" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(14,10) scale(0.6)" fill="none" stroke="#9A8B66" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M0,0 C8,-6 18,-6 24,-10 M0,0 C-2,-8 4,-14 12,-14" stroke-width="2.21"/>
      <path d="M0,0 C34,-2 54,22 44,46 C36,64 16,68 6,54 C-6,38 -10,14 0,0 Z"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div class="frame-label">NASI KANDAR SIGNATURE SET</div>
    </div>
      <div class="frame" style="width:263px;height:300px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="263" height="300" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M253,272 C253,284 247,290 235,290 L211,290" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"><svg width="114" height="85" viewBox="0 0 114 85" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(0.6)" fill="none" stroke="#9A8B66" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div class="frame-label">HALAL STEAMBOAT SPREAD</div>
    </div>
      <div class="frame" style="width:263px;height:300px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="263" height="300" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M253,272 C253,284 247,290 235,290 L211,290" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"><svg width="63" height="72" viewBox="0 0 63 72" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(6,4) scale(0.6)" fill="none" stroke="#9A8B66" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M4,60 C4,80 20,92 40,92 C60,92 76,80 76,60" />
      <path d="M40,4 C30,22 18,30 22,46 C25,58 35,60 38,52 C40,58 32,66 40,76 C50,84 64,74 60,58 C70,64 68,46 56,36 C58,28 50,18 40,4 Z" opacity="0.9"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div class="frame-label">CHINESE MUSLIM WOK DISH</div>
    </div>
      <div class="frame" style="width:263px;height:300px;border-radius:18px 18px 18px 4px;">
      <svg width="263" height="300" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <path d="M10,28 C10,16 16,10 28,10 L52,10" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M253,272 C253,284 247,290 235,290 L211,290" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
      <div style="opacity:0.55;"><svg width="66" height="68" viewBox="0 0 66 68" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(6,4) scale(0.7)" fill="none" stroke="#9A8B66" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M2,70 C2,30 30,2 70,2 C66,30 60,46 40,56 C56,52 64,40 70,24 C72,50 56,70 24,72 C40,66 48,56 50,46 C36,60 18,68 2,70 Z"/>
    </g></svg></div>
      <div class="frame-label">VEGETARIAN-FRIENDLY DISH</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:22px; font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-soft); letter-spacing:0.4px;">
      FULL MENU AVAILABLE ON REQUEST &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; QR CODE OR ONLINE MENU LINK TO BE ADDED HERE
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 07/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

<div class="page" data-document-role="page" data-label="Operations Snapshot">
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker"><svg width="55" height="86" viewBox="0 0 55 86" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(10,22) scale(0.5)" opacity="1">
      <path d="M0,90 C-10,72 8,68 2,50 C-6,34 10,28 4,10 C-2,-4 8,-10 6,-22"
        stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M22,90 C12,74 28,66 22,48 C16,32 30,24 24,6"
        stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/>
    </g></svg><span>SECTION 07 &middot; OPERATIONS SNAPSHOT</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle">Where to Find Us</h2>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:28px; margin-top:26px;">
      <div style="width:556px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:18px;padding:26px;">
        <div class="tag chili">OUTLET 01 &mdash; FLAGSHIP DINING</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-size:18px; font-weight:700; margin-top:12px;">A1 Bistro</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px; color:var(--chili-deep); font-weight:700; margin-top:6px;">16-G, Jalan PJU 5/20D, Kota Damansara, 47810 Petaling Jaya, Selangor.</div>
        <div class="dek" style="font-size:12px; margin-top:8px;">80+ seat full-service dining. Also home to Kiya's in-house menu and our central cloud kitchen.</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:556px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:18px;padding:26px;">
        <div class="tag leaf">OUTLET 02 &mdash; BALCONY DINING</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Fraunces'; font-size:18px; font-weight:700; margin-top:12px;">Kiya's &mdash; TTDI</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px; color:#2E5A3A; font-weight:700; margin-top:6px;">14A, Jalan Datuk Sulaiman, Taman Tun Dr Ismail, 60000 Kuala Lumpur.</div>
        <div class="dek" style="font-size:12px; margin-top:8px;">A first-floor restaurant with a unique open-air balcony and caf&eacute;-style indoor dining.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:24px;background:var(--broth);border-radius:18px;padding:24px 28px;">
      <div style="font-size:10.5px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#E8B36B;font-weight:700;">CATERING &amp; ONLINE REACH</div>
      <p style="font-size:12.5px;color:#DCE6DD;margin-top:10px;line-height:1.55;">We provide customised halal catering for events and
      home gatherings, and maintain a strong online presence with delivery available via GrabFood, ShopeeFood and
      Foodpanda through a dedicated cloud kitchen serving the Kota Damansara area.</p>
      <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:16px;">
        <div class="tag line-dark">GRABFOOD</div><div class="tag line-dark">SHOPEEFOOD</div><div class="tag line-dark">FOODPANDA</div><div class="tag line-dark">EVENT CATERING</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 08/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

<div class="page" data-document-role="page" data-label="Growth and Expansion">
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker"><svg width="34" height="38" viewBox="0 0 34 38" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(6,4) scale(0.24)" fill="none" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="3.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M4,60 C4,80 20,92 40,92 C60,92 76,80 76,60" />
      <path d="M40,4 C30,22 18,30 22,46 C25,58 35,60 38,52 C40,58 32,66 40,76 C50,84 64,74 60,58 C70,64 68,46 56,36 C58,28 50,18 40,4 Z" opacity="0.9"/>
    </g></svg><span>SECTION 08 &middot; GROWTH &amp; EXPANSION</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle">An Established, Growing Halal Dining Group</h2>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:24px; margin-top:30px; width:1152px;">
    <div style="width:212px;">
      <div style="width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;background:#C2401F;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-family:'Fraunces';font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;">2010</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-top:12px; line-height:1.5;">Family culinary legacy begins in Damansara Heights.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:212px;">
      <div style="width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;background:#3F7A4E;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-family:'Fraunces';font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;">2016</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-top:12px; line-height:1.5;">Ya Barr Solutions Sdn Bhd incorporated; A1 Bistro launches.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:212px;">
      <div style="width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;background:#C2401F;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-family:'Fraunces';font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;">2020</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-top:12px; line-height:1.5;">Kiya's Chinese Muslim &amp; Steamboat concept developed through R&amp;D.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:212px;">
      <div style="width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;background:#3F7A4E;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-family:'Fraunces';font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;">2023</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-top:12px; line-height:1.5;">Brands consolidate in Kota Damansara; A1 Bistro relaunches with 80+ seats.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="width:212px;">
      <div style="width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;background:#C2401F;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-family:'Fraunces';font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px;">2025</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-top:12px; line-height:1.5;">Kiya's cloud kitchen launched; new TTDI outlet opens.</div>
    </div></div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:20px; margin-top:50px;">
      <div style="width:368px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:16px;padding:30px;">
        <svg width="53" height="54" viewBox="0 0 53 54" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(14,10) scale(0.4)" fill="none" stroke="#C2401F" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M0,0 C8,-6 18,-6 24,-10 M0,0 C-2,-8 4,-14 12,-14" stroke-width="2.21"/>
      <path d="M0,0 C34,-2 54,22 44,46 C36,64 16,68 6,54 C-6,38 -10,14 0,0 Z"/>
    </g></svg>
        <div class="tag chili" style="margin-top:14px;">PLANNED EXPANSION</div>
        <p class="dek" style="margin-top:12px; font-size:12px;">Further outlets across the Klang Valley, bringing our specialist halal concepts to a wider community.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="width:368px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:16px;padding:30px;">
        <svg width="38" height="39" viewBox="0 0 38 39" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(6,4) scale(0.32)" fill="none" stroke="#D69A2D" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M2,70 C2,30 30,2 70,2 C66,30 60,46 40,56 C56,52 64,40 70,24 C72,50 56,70 24,72 C40,66 48,56 50,46 C36,60 18,68 2,70 Z"/>
    </g></svg>
        <div class="tag gold" style="margin-top:14px;">HALAL CERTIFICATION</div>
        <p class="dek" style="margin-top:12px; font-size:12px;">Formal halal certification currently in progress to strengthen consumer trust and compliance.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="width:368px;background:var(--paper-2);border-radius:16px;padding:30px;">
        <svg width="54" height="49" viewBox="0 0 54 49" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(0.24)" fill="none" stroke="#3F7A4E" stroke-width="2.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg>
        <div class="tag leaf" style="margin-top:14px;">LOCAL CONTRIBUTION</div>
        <p class="dek" style="margin-top:12px; font-size:12px;">Local employment, local supplier relationships and continued investment in the Klang Valley community.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 09/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

<div class="page dark" data-document-role="page" data-label="Contact">
  <div style="position:absolute;top:30px;right:40px;opacity:0.5;">
    <svg width="95" height="175" viewBox="0 0 95 175" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(10,22) scale(1.3)" opacity="1">
      <path d="M0,90 C-10,72 8,68 2,50 C-6,34 10,28 4,10 C-2,-4 8,-10 6,-22"
        stroke="#3F7A4E" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M22,90 C12,74 28,66 22,48 C16,32 30,24 24,6"
        stroke="#3F7A4E" stroke-width="2.4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/>
    </g></svg>
  </div>
  <div class="content">
    <div class="kicker dark"><svg width="48" height="45" viewBox="0 0 48 45" style="overflow:visible;"><g transform="translate(24,12) scale(0.2)" fill="none" stroke="#E8B36B" stroke-width="3.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <ellipse cx="60" cy="46" rx="58" ry="22"/>
      <path d="M2,46 C2,70 20,86 60,86 C100,86 118,70 118,46"/>
      <path d="M60,24 C40,24 40,46 60,46 C80,46 80,24 60,24" opacity="0.85"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="32"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="40" x2="142" y2="32"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="14" r="5"/>
    </g></svg><span>CLOSE &middot; CONTACT</span></div>
    <h2 class="htitle dark" style="margin-top:16px;">Thank You</h2>
    <div class="script" style="font-size:20px;color:#E8B36B;margin-top:8px;">We look forward to growing with our community.</div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:28px; margin-top:38px;">
      <div style="width:556px;">
        <div style="background:var(--paper);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 20px;display:inline-block;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="max-width:170px;max-height:60px;object-fit:contain;display:block;" /></div>
        <div style="margin-top:26px;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#E8B36B;font-weight:700;">TELEPHONE</div>
          <div style="font-size:14px;color:var(--paper);margin-top:5px;">+60 11-6936 6157</div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:16px;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#E8B36B;font-weight:700;">EMAIL</div>
          <div style="font-size:14px;color:var(--paper);margin-top:5px;">kiyascaters@gmail.com</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:556px;">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="max-width:200px;max-height:64px;object-fit:contain;" />
        <div style="margin-top:26px;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#E8B36B;font-weight:700;">A1 BISTRO</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--paper);margin-top:5px;">16-G, Jalan PJU 5/20D, Kota Damansara, 47810 Petaling Jaya, Selangor</div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:16px;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:#E8B36B;font-weight:700;">KIYA'S &mdash; TTDI</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--paper);margin-top:5px;">14A, Jalan Datuk Sulaiman, TTDI, 60000 Kuala Lumpur</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pagenum dark">YA BARR SOLUTIONS SDN BHD &middot; 10/10</div>
    <div class="footer-right dark">WRT LICENCE APPLICATION &mdash; COMPANY PROFILE</div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
